special_mechanics.name: Ground-based walking/movement
special_mechanics.description: During ground-based missions, player character walks through multi-room buildings to locate security cards and objectives

special_mechanics.name: Helicopter flight mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Primary gameplay involves helicopter piloting with takeoff, landing, and combat maneuvering. Not relevant to player character ground movement physics.

tier_notes: Tier 3: This is an empirical/qualitative tier game. The available Wikipedia source is a game overview that documents gameplay structure and content but contains no quantified physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel system information. The game involves both helicopter flight simulation and ground-based stealth/adventure gameplay, but specific movement mechanics for the ground character are not numerically documented in available sources.
